Double-Click Handler Has No Effect Test Page

These elements have ondblclick event handlers, but double-clicking them produces no visible change to the page content. The agent compares the DOM snapshot before and after the double-click.

Double-click me

This element has ondblclick="return false;" — the handler fires but suppresses the event without changing anything visible.

Double-click me too

This element has ondblclick="void 0;" — no-op handler, nothing changes.

Double-click for console log

This element logs to the console on double-click — but the page content remains unchanged.

Back to index
